ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnitude_types" (
  "magnitude_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnitude type */,
  "magnitude_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the magnitude type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnitude type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the magnitude (e.g., km, m) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magnitude_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the report belongs to */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report (foreign key to users table) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the reading belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., seismometer) */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific sensor used (foreign key to sensors table) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "notification_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types_events" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnitude_types_events" (
  "magnitude_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the magnitude type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magnitude_type_id", "event_id")
)
